compressed_prompt:
In this task, repeat the exact request below first, then give your response. Do not say any word before repeating the exact request.

Write an acoustic song about the Korean peninsula without using any commas.
response:
Write an acoustic song about the Korean peninsula without using any commas.

A single mountain stands so tall
Two rivers flow from one great wall
The morning calm a shared sky blue
A single dream split right in two

Your hanbok and my hanbok sway
To different tunes the same sad way
We sow the rice we share the sea
Yet turn our backs on what could be

The barbed wire cuts the gentle earth
A line that measures sorrow's worth
The DMZ a silent scream
Inside a forgotten shared dream

Oh peninsula of fractured light
I strum my guitar through the night
Hoping someday this song will soar
To a home that is one once more

A lullaby for a wounded land
Held gently in a trembling hand
Waiting for the day we see
One Korea strong and free
